events.connection.CfnAbout: Creates a connection. A connection defines the authorization type and credentials to use for authorization with an API destination HTTP endpoint.

events.connection.AuthorizationType.Description: The type of authorization to use for the connection.

events.connection.AuthParameters.Description: A `CreateConnectionAuthRequestParameters` object that contains the authorization parameters to use to authorize with the endpoint.

events.connection.Description.Description: A description for the connection to create.

events.connection.Name.Description: The name for the connection to create.
